43.reason: [Incorrectly updates level of existing left child on every traversal; level should only be set when node is created, not during search]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrectly updates level of existing left child on every traversal; level should only be set when node is created, not during search]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This line incorrectly updates the level of an existing left child on every traversal. The level should only be set when the node is first created, not during traversal. This causes incorrect height values for nodes that are visited multiple times during insertion of other nodes.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrectly updating level of existing left child on every traversal; level should only be set when node is created, not during traversal]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Incorrectly updates level of existing left child on every traversal; level should only be set when node is created, not during traversal]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This line incorrectly updates the level of an existing node during traversal. The level should only be set when inserting a new node, not while traversing. This causes incorrect height values for nodes that are not leaves or even for internal nodes that are revisited in future insertions.]

62.reason: [Fails to insert duplicate values; problem states right child includes values >= root, so duplicates should be inserted to the right subtree]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Fails to insert duplicate values; problem states right child includes values >= root, so duplicates should be inserted to the right subtree]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [When a duplicate value is encountered (aim == point->num), the new node is discarded without being inserted. However, according to the problem description, right child should be used for values >= root, so duplicates should be inserted in the right subtree. This causes missing nodes in the BST.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Fails to insert duplicate values (when aim == point->num); problem states right child should be >= root, so duplicates should go to the right subtree]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Fails to insert duplicate values; problem states right child includes values >= root, so duplicates should be inserted to the right subtree]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [When duplicate value is encountered (equal to current node), insertion is skipped entirely. However, per problem description, right child should be used for values >= root. So duplicates should be inserted to the right subtree, not ignored. This causes missing nodes in the BST.]
